productDisplayName: Fila Men Glam II Multi Coloured Shoes
description: Arty with sporty graffiti, this fila Glam II shoe is a great buy. With a comfortable fabric upper and grippy outsole, it's a perfect buy for those who never compromise in comfort and style. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance, breathability and durability Arty print for style Carbon rubber toe box with PU foxing for enhanced protection to the forefoot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Midsole Padded fabric footbed made for absolute cushioning and all-day in-step comfort Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Pivot point on the big toe mound along horizontal flex grooves and has fila brand name-styled lugs all over the outsole for absolute grip Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
